
{{CargoRelic
|name=Proclamation 95
|rank=SS
|affct=FAME
|birthday=10-27
|source=Fragment Crafting (0.61), Lottery Machine (0.24%), Wishing (0.22%), Master Scrolls (0.19%), Grandmaster Scrolls (2.1%), FAME Master Scroll (9.2%)
|description=On Oct 27, 1862, Lincoln officially issued the Emancipation Proclamation.

Before the Emancipation Proclamation, many slaves were exploited by slaveholders, which was condoned by the Constitution. During the Civil War, a large number of slaves joined the Union Army, so it became a priority to give these soldiers legal freedom. But worried about internal divisions, Lincoln did not issue a declaration until after the Union Army repelled the Confederates at the Battle of Antioch.
|fame=105
|art=62
|fth=62
|civ=63
|tech=55
|ss1=Chore Dispatch SPD +0.8%<br>Per 3 FAME Relics gained, Snail DEF +8<br>Per 3 FAME Relics gained, Snail RUSH +8<br>FAME Relics: 60/60
|ss2=Chore Dispatch SPD +1.2%<br>Per 3 FAME Relics gained, Snail DEF +12<br>Per 3 FAME Relics gained, Snail RUSH +12<br>FAME Relics: 60/60
|ss3=Chore Dispatch SPD +1.6%<br>Per 3 FAME Relics gained, Snail DEF +16<br>Per 3 FAME Relics gained, Snail RUSH +16<br>FAME Relics: 60/60
|ss4=Chore Dispatch SPD +2.4%<br>Per 3 FAME Relic's Gained, Snail DEF +24<br>Per 3 FAME Relic's Gained, Snail RUSH +24<br>Fame Relics: 60/60
|ss5=Chore Dispatch SPD +3.2%<br>Per 3 FAME Relics gained, Snail DEF +32<br>Per 3 FAME Relics gained, Snail RUSH +32<br>FAME Relics: 60/60
|ss6=Chore Dispatch SPD +4.4%<br>Per 3 FAME Relics gained, Snail DEF +44<br>Per 3 FAME Relics gained, Snail RUSH +44<br>FAME Relics: 60/60
|ss7=Chore Dispatch SPD +4.4%<br>Per 3 FAME Relics gained, Snail DEF +44<br>Per 3 FAME Relics gained, Snail RUSH +44<br>FAME Relics: 60/60<br>Chore Dispatch SPD +4% (Awakened)
|skill1=[[File:Murika skill III.png|50px]]Place in Murikan Museum: In Murika, food consumed -15%
|skill2=[[File:Murika skill III.png|50px]]Place in Murikan Museum: In Murika, Zombie Cells gained +30%
|skill3=[[File:Lumbercamp skill III.png|50px]]Place in Lumber Camp: This Relic's FAME +15
|mirage={{#invoke:snailDB|parseMirage|{{PAGENAME}}}}
}}

[[Category:Chore Dispatch Speed Boost]]
[[Category:Relic Boost]]
[[Category:DEF Boost]]
[[Category:RUSH Boost]]
[[Category:Murika Museum Boost]]
[[Category:Murika Exploration Boost]]
[[Category:Food Consumed Reduction]]
[[Category:Exploration Cell Drop Boost]]
[[Category:Zombie Cell Drop Boost]]
[[Category:Lumber Camp Skill]]
[[Category:FAME Boost]]
[[Category:Ad Shop Boost]]
[[Category:HP Boost]]
[[Category:Zombie Gene Speedup Boost]]
[[Category:Tomb Figure Boost]]
